corpus.title: Secondary Official Record — Country X
corpus.snippet: Secondary analysis of Country X data with minor discrepancy.
corpus.content:
OFFICIAL RECORD — Country X
Date: 2024-01-10

This record confirms Country X reported GDP growth of 3.4% in 2023, while inflation averaged 6.1%, resulting in negative real income growth. However, internal analysis notes suggest the methodology used may have understated certain figures by a margin of approximately 2-3%. Further review is pending.
